title: 7 Best Blue-Chip Stocks to Buy Now for Safety
text: The S&P 500 is down more than 15% in 2022. That makes it difficult to find the best blue-chip stocks to buy to keep the bear market away.

title: 2 Best Dividend Stocks That Wall Street Is Sleeping on
text: These two blue-chip companies offer market-beating dividend yields.

title: T. Rowe Price: This Dividend Aristocrat Is Ripe For An Investment
text: Shares of TROW have declined by -49.84% since the fall of 2021, and every time TROW has declined by more than -25% since 1993, it ultimately made new highs in the future. TROW's dividend is yielding 3.94%, and TROW has provided 37 years of annual dividend increases to its investors since its IPO in 1986.

title: T. Rowe (TROW) April AUM Down 8.5% on Unfavorable Markets
text: T. Rowe Price (TROW) reports preliminary AUM of $1.42 trillion as of Apr 30, 2022, down 8.5% sequentially due to unfavorable markets.

title: Why T Rowe Price Group Is A Top 25 SAFE Dividend Stock
text: T Rowe Price﻿TROW﻿ Group has been named to the Dividend Channel ''S.A.F.E. 25'' list, signifying a stock with above-average ''DividendRank'' statistics including a strong 4.2% yield
